svg.text: Field Notes on Machines That Turn Work Into Capability
AI creates output. GoalOS creates proof.
No proof, no memory. No replay, no settlement. No rollback, no release.
Objective -> Proof Mission -> AGI Jobs -> Evidence -> Chronicle -> Validated Skill -> On-chain Graph Root -> Future Mission Improvement
repair path: failing candidates create new proof jobs · admitted skills become governed priors
Nothing becomes reusable capability until Chronicle admits it.
Set an objective. Choose proof level. Create only
the AGI Jobs needed by this mission. Inspect
evidence. Admit skills only when the gate passes.
Commitments, graph roots, attestations, and policy
proofs can be public. Private method, traces,
reviewer notes, and sensitive context stay encrypted
Mission Contract, Proof Debt Register, AGI Jobs,
Skill Capsule, and Graph Root Record.
Do not remember what was merely said. Remember what was proven, bounded, replayable, and safe to reuse.
